Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom)
Patric Hooper, Esq. 310-551-8111 Hooper Lundy snd Bookman for Petitioner.
Machaela Mingardi, Esq. Deputy Attorney General 415-510-3469 for Respondent Medical Board of California.
Court Reporter: Cheri Bullock, CSR#4714, 661-645-4048, cheridbullock@gmail.com, Reported.

Argued. Hearing is held. Mr Hooper presents oral argument. The Court shares 3 points. Ms.Mingardi responds and argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER GREGORY COLBURN's Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate.

Taken under submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Cheri Bullock, CSR#4714, 661-645-4048, cheridbullock@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)
